system.effect: The psyker projects a bolt of bio-lightning at a single target, dealing 1d10 + Psy Rating Energy damage with Pen 4.

description.value: The psyker conjures a bolt of bio-electric energy and hurls it at his foe. This is a Psychic Bolt that deals 1d10 + Psy Rating Energy damage with a Penetration of 4. The bolt strikes a single target within range.
